  "findings": [
    "Personnel working directly under a suspended load"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Order an immediate stand-down and halt all crane operations",
    "Clear all personnel from the fall zone and the area beneath the suspended load",
    "Establish a controlled access zone with physical barricades and warning signs",
    "Conduct a safety stand-down meeting to review safe rigging and lifting protocols with the crew"
  ],
  "rationale": "Working under a suspended load is a critical safety violation that poses an immediate threat of severe injury or death. OSHA regulations strictly prohibit employees from standing or working under suspended loads unless specific, highly controlled conditions (such as steel erection hooking/unhooking) are met, and even then, exposure must be minimized.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.1425",
    "OSHA 1926.753"
  ]
